summary: The diff implements a comprehensive Highway Code + case law fault reference tool with scenario selector, fault matrix, legal references, and professional styling. All five requirements are substantially addressed. The implementation covers dedicated routing, scenario selector UI with icons, fault matrix with visual bars, legal reference data, and professional theming. Minor uncertainty exists around the completeness of faultMatrix.ts data (truncated) and whether all 7 scenario types have full fault split data, but the evidence strongly suggests full coverage.
